headline: Sonida Senior Living: The Turnaround Is Over, Now Comes The Compounding
summary: Sonida Senior Living (SNDA) post-pandemic rebound and $1.8B CNL deal: synergies, occupancy/NOI upside, and leverage risks. See more here.
